series_metadata.series_description: Needed for Balancing of Combined Simulcast Purse Fund. 3769.089(f)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved Then destroy. ; Electronic: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved Then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
